_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.558), RC-K-014 (RC, cosine: 0.556).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.470). Shared vocabulary: [skill, technical]. DCWF-only terms [audits, conducting, reviews, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.911, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:73.7%, C:26.3%). No dominant classification for "Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems." vs "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.621 > STS 0.470 (gap +0.151). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [skill, technical]. DCWF-only: [audits, conducting, reviews, systems]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, documentation].

signals.detail: STS 0.470 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.151 with low STS 0.470. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
